# edgecenter_dbaas_backup (Data Source)

Retrieve a DBaaS backup by its ID or unique name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "edgecenter" {
  permanent_api_token = "251$d3361.............1b35f26d8"
}

data "edgecenter_dbaas_backup" "example" {
  project_id = 1
  region_id  = 1
  name       = "backup-example"
}

output "backup_view" {
  value = data.edgecenter_dbaas_backup.example
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The backup UUID. Either 'id' or 'name' must be specified.
- `name` (String) The unique backup name. Either 'id' or 'name' must be specified.
- `project_id` (Number) The project ID. Either 'project_id' or 'project_name' must be specified.
- `project_name` (String) The project name. Either 'project_id' or 'project_name' must be specified.
- `region_id` (Number) The region ID. Either 'region_id' or 'region_name' must be specified.
- `region_name` (String) The region name. Either 'region_id' or 'region_name' must be specified.

### Read-Only

- `backup_type` (String)
- `cluster_id` (String)
- `created_at` (String)
- `creator_task_id` (String)
- `dbms` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--dbms))
- `description` (String)
- `finished_at` (String)
- `has_child` (Boolean)
- `is_service` (Boolean)
- `parent_id` (String)
- `size` (Number)
- `status` (String)
- `task_id` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--dbms"></a>
### Nested Schema for `dbms`

Read-Only:

- `type` (String)
- `version` (String)
